title: Rootless 'podman start' with the overlay driver fails due to missing /etc/passwd on the first attempt after a 'stop'
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

With the overlay driver, once a rootless container has been explicitly stopped with `podman stop`, the subsequent `start` will always fail. Retrying the `start` will work.

Here's my `~/.config/containers/storage.conf`:
```
[storage]
  driver = "overlay"
  runroot = "/run/user/1000"
  graphroot = "/home/rishi/.local/share/containers/storage"
  [storage.options]
    mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
```

Here's an example session:
```
$ podman create --user root fedora:29 /bin/sh
dcba84b883a1614bfb4963e7bf02191bdc1cc5ad258608bf38ad2ff6f0e48050
$ podman start --latest
dcba84b883a1614bfb4963e7bf02191bdc1cc5ad258608bf38ad2ff6f0e48050
$ podman stop --latest
dcba84b883a1614bfb4963e7bf02191bdc1cc5ad258608bf38ad2ff6f0e48050
$ podman start --latest
unable to start container "dcba84b883a1614bfb4963e7bf02191bdc1cc5ad258608bf38ad2ff6f0e48050": unable to find user root: no matching entries in passwd file
$ podman start --latest
dcba84b883a1614bfb4963e7bf02191bdc1cc5ad258608bf38ad2ff6f0e48050
$
```

Notice how the second to latest command failed. A bit of digging reveals that `GetExecUserPath` in `runc/libcontainer/user/user.go` can't find `/etc/passwd`.

This doesn't happen with the `vfs` driver.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.12.2-dev
Go Version:    go1.11.2
Git Commit:    "7f91ebb441846bc5a9c44861c70bec66b9015fa3"
Built:         Wed Jan  9 18:40:20 2019
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

This happening since at least `0.12.1.1`.

**Output of `podman info`:**

Sadly `podman` broke after fiddling with `storage.conf` while filing this issue.

```
$ podman --log-level=debug info
INFO[0000] running as rootless                          
DEBU[0000] Initializing boltdb state at /home/rishi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod/bolt_state.db 
DEBU[0000] Using graph driver overlay                   
DEBU[0000] Using graph root /var/lib/containers/storage 
DEBU[0000] Using run root /var/run/containers/storage   
DEBU[0000] Using static dir /home/rishi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod 
DEBU[0000] Using tmp dir /run/user/1000/libpod/tmp      
DEBU[0000] Set libpod namespace to ""                   
ERRO[0000] could not get runtime: mkdir /var/run/containers/storage: permission denied
```
